summary: The answer correctly identifies that B79-specific RMCD/PL questions should route through local project context in context/projects and knowledge/projects before relying on generic optical keywords, and it lists relevant observables including RMCD/MCD and PL/PLE. It appropriately notes that the supplied context does not expose a B79-specific entry or root, so it cannot give B79-specific results. Citations are file-level rather than line-level but are attached to the right claims.
